label: Additional Product Classification Details
comment: A product classification for the product other than the Global Product Classification(GPC brick value).

label: Additive Details
comment: A set of details about one of the additives within the product.

label: Allergen Details
comment: Details of an allergen for a product.

label: Authenticity Details
comment: A set of details about covert or overt security features that may contribute to checking the authenticity of a product or product instance.

label: Award Prize
comment: Describes a prize or award won by a product or organization.

label: Beverage
comment: Any potable liquid.

label: Brand
comment: Information on brands and sub-brands for a product.

label: Certification
comment: Certification issued by a certifying body to a certification subject (Organization, Place, Product).

label: Clothing
comment: A product that is worn on the body.

label: Colour Code Details
comment: A set of colour code details (colour code, party controlling the code list) for the product.

label: Compulsory Additional Information
comment: The group of compulsory information about a product.

label: Contact
comment: Information on an individual or department acting as point of contact for an organiation.

label: Country
comment: Country is a complex data type that indicates a country and a country subdivision.

label: Diet Type Code Details
comment: A set of diet type code details (diet type code and diet type sub code) for the product.

label: Discount
comment: Provides information on a discount applicable to an offer for example 2 percent.

label: Food and Beverage Preparation Information
comment: Food and Beverage Preparation Information is a complex data type that indicates a preparation state code and preparation instructions.

label: Food Beverage Tobacco Ingredient
comment: Food Beverage Tobacco Ingredient is a complex data type that includes an ingredient statement and details.

label: Food Beverage Tobacco Product
comment: A food, beverage or tobacco product.

label: Footwear
comment: Outerwear that is worn on the feet such as shoes or boots.

label: Fruits and Vegetables
comment: Contains properties related specifically to fruit and vegetable products.

label: GeoCoordinates
comment: The geographic coordinates of a place or event.

label: GeoShape
comment: The geographic shape of a place. A GeoShape can be described using several properties whose values are based on latitude/longitude pairs. Either whitespace or commas can be used to separate latitude and longitude; whitespace should be used when writing a list of several such points.

label: Location ID Details
comment: Government bodies, trade organisations, and other parties issue identifiers that are associated to locations. Linking these identifiers to GLN and one another supports consolidating records, mapping related, collaborative identifiers, enhances search ability and enables more efficient transitions between identifiers. This class provides a mechanism for connecting and sharing location identifiers.

label: Location Status History
comment: Over the lifetime of a location, it may go through periods of being active and inactive. gs1:LocationStatusHistory allows changes in status to be communicated in advance and tracked over time.

label: Meat Poultry
comment: Meat and poultry products.

label: Message
comment: Any kind of electronic message for communication of information from one party to one or more other parties.

label: Milk Butter Cream Yogurt Cheese Eggs Substitutes
comment: Milk butter cream yogurts cheese eggs and any substitutes for these products.

label: Nutrition Measurement Type
comment: A class providing nutritional value and intake percent.

label: Offer
comment: An offer to transfer some rights to an item or to provide a service,for example, an offer to sell tickets to an event, to rent the DVD of a movie, to stream a TV show over the internet, to repair a motorcycle, or to loan a book.

label: Organic Claim Details
comment: A set of organic claim details for the product.

label: Organization
comment: An Organization is any legal or physical entity involved at any point in any supply chain and upon which there is a need to retrieve predefined information. An Organization is uniquely identified by a Global Location Number (GLN).

label: Organisation ID Details
comment: Government bodies, trade organisations, and other parties issue identifiers that are associated to legal entities and/or functions. Linking these identifiers to GLN and one another supports consolidating records, mapping related, collaborative identifiers, enhances search ability and enables more efficient transitions between identifiers. This class provides a mechanism for connecting and sharing party identifiers.

label: Organisation Status History
comment: Over the lifetime of an organisation, it may go through periods of being active and inactive. gs1:OrganizationStatusHistory allows changes in status to be communicated in advance and tracked over time.

label: Packaging
comment: Details on packaging for a product for example packaging type (bottle), materials, features, recycling, etc..

label: Packaging Material Details
comment: Information on any material used for packaging.

label: Place
comment: Entities that have a somewhat fixed, physical location.

label: Address
comment: The location at which a particular organization or person may be found or reached.

label: Price Specification
comment: A structured value representing a monetary amount, consisting of a value and currency code.

label: Product
comment: Any item (product or service) upon which there is a need to retrieve pre-defined information and that may be priced, or ordered, or invoiced at any point in any supply chain.

label: Product Yield Details
comment: A grouping of properties related to the yield of a food or beverage product according to a specified type of preparation.

label: Measurement Type
comment: A point value or interval for product characteristics and other purposes. A unit of measurement is also specified.

label: Referenced File
comment: Provides URL and other information on a referenced electronic file.

label: Regulatory Identifier
comment: A repeatable grouping of identifiers that reference one document, record or dataset within one regulatory information system, repository or registry

label: Regulatory Information
comment: Information on applicable government regulations applicable to a trade item

label: Regulatory Notification
comment: A notification message about information on applicable government regulations applicable to a trade item

label: Returnable Package Deposit Details
comment: Details of the deposit for returnable packaging for a product.

label: Seafood
comment: Seafood Products including fish and shellfish.

label: Size Code Details
comment: A grouping of properties related to the representing the size of a product, by specifying a value from a specified code list.

label: Size Details
comment: A grouping of properties related to the size of a wearable product

label: Target Market Details
comment: A set of target market details (product release date and associated countries) for the product.

label: Textile Material
comment: Details on the composition of any materials used to make a product using textiles.

label: Transaction
comment: A repeatable grouping of identifiers that identify a business transaction ID and its type

label: Type Code
comment: A code list.

label: Warranty
comment: An assurance that the product is reliable and that repairs or replacement will be done free of charge within a given time limit and under certain conditions in the event of a defect.

label: Wearable Product
comment: Products that are worn on the body.
